hooks.description: Advisory read-scope warning (intentional, not an oversight): emits a stderr notice when a Read/Grep/Glob call targets a path outside the active vault. Non-blocking by deliberate architectural design — read operations carry no mutation risk to vault data, so least-privilege enforcement for reads is observability-only. Write/Edit/MultiEdit calls are fully fail-closed by the firewall.sh + protect-raw.sh + validate-frontmatter.sh chain (which does block). This advisory-only posture is the documented security boundary: reads warn; writes are gated.
Block SKILL.md edits that add side-effecting verbs without disable-model-invocation: true (path-filtered inside the script)
Warn when a must/never/always rule is added to CLAUDE.md without a corresponding hook (path-filtered inside the script)

Strict-tree conformance gate (ADR-0036): after the polish/maintenance agents return, warn (non-blocking) when cross-tree edges, parent-chain cycles, or multi-parent pages remain — i.e. the strict-tree-reduce self-heal did not converge. Read-only; degrades silently without Bun.

Commit backstop: after a write-path agent (ingest/curator/polish/maintenance) returns, commit any vault changes left uncommitted so no LLM write escapes git coverage. Pathspec-scoped to the vault; honors gitCheckpoint.mode=off; never blocks (always exit 0). Runs last so the verify/lint gates report first.

Persist session learning as source_type: agent-session raw source when CLAUDE_WIKI_PAGES_SESSION_SCRATCH is set. Lazy: no-op when scratch absent or empty. Idempotent on session ID. Does NOT ingest to wiki — that happens on next /wiki or maintenance pass.

Persist session learning as source_type: agent-session raw source when CLAUDE_WIKI_PAGES_SESSION_SCRATCH is set. Lazy: no-op when scratch absent or empty. Idempotent on session ID. Does NOT ingest to wiki — that happens on next /wiki or maintenance pass.
